description: The nix flake devShell should include the bd binary so hooks like 'bd prime' work inside nix develop. Currently bd is only available after building from source.
title: Add bd binary to nix devshell

acceptance_criteria:
- typed Request/Response support exists for tracker queries and mutations needed by the Symphony tracker boundary
- daemon handlers and HTTP transport round-trips are covered by tests
- invalid board-state/storage combinations are detected and surfaced deterministically
- API docs/grounding doc explain the supported board states and mapping rules
description: Add a typed daemon query/mutation surface that turns beads into a credible tracker backend for board/Symphony consumers. Keep HTTP transport thin and reuse the existing Request/Response RPC contract rather than inventing a parallel REST API.
design: Extend beads-api and beads-surface with tracker-oriented issue projections and state mutations, then implement the corresponding daemon handlers and HTTP coverage. The surface must support listing candidate issues by state, fetching issue states by ids, updating tracker state, and creating tracker comments/workpad notes. State mapping must be explicit and validated so app/Symphony consumers see stable board states.
title: Typed tracker/board daemon RPC surface for Symphony-style workflows
